title: The Log Points Forward
description: On pages 16, 17, 18, 19, this part focuses on a new crewmate and a new mystery. Robin settles into the ship while the crew argues, adapts, and begins moving toward the strange next stage of the Grand Line.
scene: This scene belongs to the A New Crewmate and a New Mystery sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The sheep- ship is heading east!

summary: Robin settles into the ship while the crew argues, adapts, and begins moving toward the strange next stage of the Grand Line.
